competing_value: Hybrid PQC + classical KEM is the recommended deployment pattern for the transition window
disagreement_summary: NSA CNSA 2.0 §2.1 mandates ML-KEM as the sole approved KEM for NSS at GA; ANSSI's "guide pour la transition vers la cryptographie post-quantique" (Jan 2024 / r3 2025) recommends hybrid (ECDHE + ML-KEM) deployments through at least 2030 for systems handling sensitive (DR) data. Both are Tier-1 government sources giving operationally divergent guidance for systems that must comply with both regimes.
